creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
After upgrading x11/libmatekbd (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=8b120aa5b56444590b8b93416fa20ead05ded2be) I'm getting the following error launching Keyboard from mate-control-center
$ mate-control-center 
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libmatekbdui.so.4" not found, required by "mate-keyboard-properties"
